creator: rwatson@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-bugs->rwatson

I've committed a related patch as if_tun.c:1.158.  I'll leave this PR 
open until the MFC has taken place. 

date: 2006/08/08 19:22:25;  author: rwatson;  state: Exp;  lines: +119 -1 
Add kqueue support to if_tun.  Loosely based on if_tap changes. 

Two almost identical patches based on the if_tap work were submitted 
via GNATS; I started out with the patch in 100796 from David Gilbert, 
but could have easily started with the patch from Vilmos Nebehaj which 
I found only later. 

MFC after:      1 week 
PR:             93976, 100796
